pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Obsessed feels personal. It does not just attack. It watches, follows, and makes the player feel noticed.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Even when it is quiet, it still feels dangerous. Silence around it never feels safe.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Watching$()$(br2)It creates fear by staying near and letting the player notice it.$(br2)$(l)Escalation$()$(br2)As things get worse, it becomes more aggressive and more monstrous.
